response.justification: While Aisha demonstrates strong general engineering expertise across 15+ years, this role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (completely absent from resume), recent embedded systems and security technologies experience. Her recent career (2018-present) has moved entirely toward web/full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, while the last relevant embedded/systems work was 6-10 years ago. Critical gaps include: no experience with MACsec, 802.1X, switch operation, NETCONF/SNMP/Telemetry, or Linux kernel security countermeasures—all required technical skills.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development demonstrating strong problem-solving and ability to learn across multiple domains
Previous C/C++ experience at National Instruments and embedded systems exposure showing capability with systems-level code
Strong Linux and infrastructure knowledge evidenced by CI/CD setup, Docker expertise, and open-source contributions
concerns: Native-level Japanese proficiency is an explicit requirement and is completely absent from resume (lists English, Romanian, German only)
Recent 6+ years of career entirely away from embedded systems—focused on web/full-stack TypeScript/Node.js development with no systems-level work since 2018
No demonstrated experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), networking technologies (NETCONF, SNMP, Telemetry), or Linux kernel security modifications

key_factors.factor: Career divergence from embedded systems (6+ years in web/full-stack)
No security or networking domain expertise
